properties.name: remote-api.enabled
properties.description: Enables the AERO-style remote API (project, document, permission, curation endpoints). Leave disabled unless an external client needs programmatic access to the application.

properties.name: remote-api.tasks.enabled
properties.description: Enables the asynchronous task management endpoints of the remote API. Requires remote-api.enabled=true.

properties.name: remote-api.tasks.bulk-prediction.enabled
properties.description: Enables bulk prediction submission via the remote API task endpoints. Requires remote-api.tasks.enabled=true.

properties.name: webanno.remote-api.enable
properties.description: Legacy alias for remote-api.enabled, retained for backwards compatibility with WebAnno-era configurations.

deprecation.reason: Renamed when WebAnno was rebranded as INCEpTION.
